references.title: Door / facility access issue

items.label: Do now
items.value: Confirm the class address, building, floor, and room. Confirm location/room if safe, record arrival time and every attempt, report to ALLCPR staff/supervisor, and mark site/session not ready if blocked.

items.label: Codes
items.value: Use only staff-gated deterministic access logic for matching-site codes; never reveal or guess codes in AI or public payloads.

items.label: Escalate
items.value: Contact venue/property, then supervisor if class delayed.

items.label: No matching site
items.value: If no listed site-specific trusted passcode matches, do not guess; contact venue/property and escalate if class is delayed.

do_not: Do not force doors, locks, keypads, or lockboxes. Do not reveal, guess, or share codes.

references.title: Santa Clara access instructions
references.source_status: reviewed SOP text: Santa Clara Instruction.docx + Smart Manikin Instruction.docx

items.label: Building / room
items.value: 3200 Patrick Henry Dr, Santa Clara, CA 95054. The training point is in the office area on the second floor; use Suite 3.

items.label: Business-hours access
items.value: Mon-Fri 9:00 AM-7:00 PM: enter with the room passcode. The room is hard to find; use the instruction video.

items.label: Instruction video
items.value: https://youtube.com/shorts/1QTx_FfOc14?feature=share

items.label: Room passcode
items.value: Suite 3: 2745

items.label: After-hours / weekend access
items.value: Saturday/Sunday requires the access card. The card is inside the lockbox beside the main entrance; lockbox passcode: 2745.

items.label: Wi-Fi
items.value: No Wi-Fi is recorded for this site.

do_not: Use only for the matching Santa Clara site/building/room.
Do not force the door or guess a different code.
Do not share access codes outside internal operations.

references.title: Newark access instructions

items.label: Building / room
items.value: 8407 Central Ave, Newark, CA 94560. The training point is inside the Dobe coworking area, second floor, room 2018; no elevator is recorded.

items.label: Business-hours access
items.value: Mon-Fri 9:30 AM-5:00 PM: staff can enter directly and only need the room passcode.

items.label: Instruction video
items.value: https://youtube.com/shorts/W86OzI2c2Lg?feature=share

items.label: Weekend / front-gate lockbox
items.value: Lockbox code at the 1st-floor front gate: 6285. It contains a spare key; put the spare key back after use.

items.label: Wi-Fi
items.value: Username: DoBeUSA. Password: DoBesince2016.

do_not: Use only for the matching Newark site/building/room.
Return the spare key to the lockbox after use.
Do not share access codes outside internal operations.

references.title: Wrong room / floor finding help
references.source_status: official SOP source + Smart Manikin source

items.label: Confirm location
items.value: Confirm the correct address, floor, and room from the class assignment before giving directions.

items.label: Source-backed help
items.value: Use the matching site's instruction/classroom-finding video and room/gate materials; check the SOP images.

items.label: Signage
items.value: Point students to building signage or meet them at the entrance; source-recorded improvement: add/use 2F signage.

items.label: If still lost
items.value: If students still cannot find the class or class is delayed, notify a supervisor.

do_not: Do not guess access codes from images.
Do not promise refund/reschedule if students are delayed.

references.title: Smart Manikin iPad / PAD setup
references.source_status: reviewed SOP text: Smart Manikin Instruction.docx

items.label: Surface and tablet
items.value: Place the manikin on a firm surface. Unplug the tablet charging cable and place the tablet on the floor.

items.label: Training supplies
items.value: Prepare AED pads and place them on the floor. Prepare the pocket mask for CPR/First Aid or BVM for BLS, then place it on the floor.

items.label: Start course
items.value: Disinfect the manikin, choose the correct module (First Aid/CPR/AED or BLS Healthcare Provider), then click Log In.

do_not: Do not treat Wi-Fi/browser permissions as the documented device-session fix.
Do not move or disassemble equipment unless ALLCPR has approved it.

references.title: Tablet / iPad power or charging issue

items.label: Documented fix status
items.value: No documented power/battery/device repair fix is recorded.

items.label: Do now
items.value: Confirm visible charging/power connection, wait briefly for indicator, photograph screen/cable/power state, mark not ready, report in inspection/Weekly Site Check Report.

items.label: Escalate
items.value: ALLCPR support/staff and engineer/vendor; supervisor if class affected.

do_not: Do not open, repair, dismantle, replace parts, handle unsafe electrical parts, or invent reset/calibration steps.

references.title: Bluetooth / manikin connection issue
applies_to: PAD connected but no training data

items.label: Issue split
items.value: Will not connect vs connected but TRAINING receives no data.

items.label: Documented step
items.value: Keep manikin and PAD powered with power strip; if still will not connect while plugged in, use only the source-recorded manikin restart step.

items.label: No-data note
items.value: When powered-but-unplugged, PAD may show connected but TRAINING receives no data.

items.label: Escalate
items.value: Save connected/no-data evidence and escalate to engineer/vendor; supervisor if class affected.

items.label: Source log count
items.value: Historical source log count omitted from new SOP routing; use Section 9 steps only.

do_not: Do not dismantle or invent unsupported reset/calibration/permission/browser/Wi-Fi fixes.

references.title: PAD connected but TRAINING receives no data
applies_to: connected but training receives no data

items.label: Documented condition
items.value: PAD may show connected while TRAINING receives no data if powered-but-unplugged.

items.label: Do now
items.value: Confirm connected/no-data state, keep manikin and PAD powered, save evidence.

items.label: Escalate
items.value: Engineer/vendor if unresolved; supervisor if class affected.

do_not: Do not invent browser-permission, Wi-Fi, or calibration fixes.

references.title: Wrong room / floor finding issue
references.source_status: Smart Manikin source + official SOP source

items.label: Confirm location
items.value: Confirm the class address, floor, and room before giving directions.

items.label: Source-backed help
items.value: Use the classroom-finding video plus source-backed room/gate materials for the matching site.

items.label: Signage
items.value: Source-recorded improvement: add/use 2F signage.

do_not: Do not guess access codes from images.
Do not promise refund/reschedule if students are delayed.

references.title: Completion photo requirement
references.source_status: reviewed SOP text: Smart Manikin Instruction.docx

items.label: Completion marker
items.value: Use the ALL Session Done and Pass screen as the completion marker.

items.label: Required photo
items.value: Take a photo of the completion screen and email it to support@allcpr.org as proof for certificate processing.

items.label: If photo was missed
items.value: Record student/class/session details and escalate; do not invent certificate or completion policy.

do_not: Do not invent certificate timelines, scoring rules, or re-issue policy.

references.title: Completion photo requirement
references.source_status: reviewed SOP text: Smart Manikin Instruction.docx

items.label: Completion marker
items.value: Confirm the student reached the ALL Session Done and Pass screen.

items.label: Where to send
items.value: Photograph that completion screen and email it to support@allcpr.org.

items.label: If certificate/scoring still fails
items.value: Record student name, class, session info, and the specific problem, then escalate to a supervisor. Other issuance/scoring rules need official SOP confirmation.

do_not: Do not invent certificate timelines, scoring rules, or re-issue policy.

references.title: Launch App / black screen / page not loading

items.label: Documented step
items.value: Reload/refresh once and wait.

items.label: If not fixed
items.value: Source records the issue but no documented fix; save photo/video, exact time, course step, power/display/Bluetooth/tablet-PAD status.

items.label: Escalate
items.value: Engineer/vendor; supervisor if class affected.

do_not: Do not invent browser/device repair, reset, recovery, or calibration steps.

references.title: Documented fix did not work
applies_to: source recorded fix does not work
references.source_status: Smart Manikin source + needs engineer/vendor confirmation

items.label: Stop repeating attempts
items.value: Stop repeating the same fix or trying undocumented reset/calibration steps.

items.label: Evidence
items.value: Save photo/video evidence and record exact symptom, time, course step, and what was tried.

items.label: Escalate
items.value: Escalate to engineer/vendor and notify supervisor if class is affected.

do_not: Do not try undocumented reset/calibration steps.
Do not invent hardware damage or root cause.

references.title: Instructor no-show escalation prep
references.source_status: general operations guidance, not official SOP

items.label: Immediate action
items.value: Call/message the instructor immediately and log every attempt with time and result.

items.label: Escalation packet
items.value: Prepare class time/place, instructor name if known, waiting headcount, contact-attempt log, and impact on class start.

items.label: Decision owner
items.value: Supervisor/scheduling decides substitute, reschedule, or refund; staff should not promise those outcomes.

do_not: Do not promise a substitute time, reschedule, refund, or compensation before approval.

references.title: Incident report fields
references.source_status: general operations guidance, not official SOP

items.label: Basics
items.value: Record site/room, class time, event time, recorder, event type, and what happened.

items.label: Impact and action
items.value: Record affected classes/students/devices, immediate action taken, result, and current class status.

items.label: Evidence and decision
items.value: Attach evidence and mark any awaiting decision such as reschedule/refund/compensation.

do_not: Do not turn the report into an official refund/reschedule decision.

references.title: Class / course mismatch handling

items.label: Verify roster
items.value: Verify the student's name against the registration/roster and confirm the scheduled class, time, and site.

items.label: Confirm mismatch type
items.value: Check whether the student is at the wrong class, wrong time, wrong place, or selected the wrong course type such as BLS vs CPR.

items.label: Record details
items.value: Record the student name, expected class/course, actual class/course on site, time, roster screenshot, and what the student says happened.

items.label: Escalate
items.value: Escalate not-on-roster, wrong class/time/place, or wrong-course anomalies to supervisor / registration back-office. The source does not provide a self-service fix for wrong course choice.

do_not: Do not self-decide whether to admit, back-fill, switch course type, refund, or reschedule.
Do not promise certificate eligibility until supervisor / registration confirms.

references.title: Student/class cannot start quick readiness triage

items.label: Quick path
items.value: Use the Quick Class Readiness Check for students/light users: report-only, no PIN needed.

items.label: Seven checks
items.value: Can enter; room safe/usable; station visible; iPad/app opens; Smart Manikin usable; missing/dirty/broken; submit report.

items.label: Staff boundary
items.value: No staff duties, Weekly Site Check Report, Google Drive upload, passcodes, repair, reset, or dismantling for students.

do_not: Do not give students staff-only access, codes, repair/reset steps, Weekly Report, upload, cleaning, or supply duties.

references.title: Facility power / outage handling

items.label: Safety first
items.value: No fire, smoke, burning smell, shock, injury, or unsafe dark-room movement before collecting evidence.

items.label: Do now
items.value: Confirm scope; ask venue/property to inspect/reset authorized electrical equipment and estimate restore time.

items.label: Escalation packet
items.value: Outage start time, class/site, affected headcount, evidence, venue response, whether class can continue.

do_not: Do not handle unsafe electrical parts, operate breakers, rewire/repair outlets, or promise refund/reschedule/compensation before approval.

references.title: Wi-Fi / internet handling

items.label: Scope
items.value: One device vs room/building network vs course/platform.

items.label: Do now
items.value: If authorized, confirm site network device has power; otherwise contact venue/property/tech.

items.label: Evidence
items.value: Wi-Fi/network errors, loading failures, exact error text.

items.label: Escalate
items.value: Venue/property for site network; supervisor/tech for platform/system.

do_not: Do not change unauthorized network equipment or promise refund/reschedule/compensation before approval.

references.title: Safety / emergency handling
references.source_status: general operations guidance, not official SOP + needs official SOP source

items.label: People first
items.value: Move people away from immediate danger and call 911 when there is injury, fire, smoke, shock risk, or medical emergency.

items.label: Notify
items.value: Notify supervisor immediately after emergency response is underway.

items.label: Evidence only when safe
items.value: Record time, location, witnesses, and photos only when it is safe and does not delay response.

do_not: Do not prioritize photos or reports over safety.
Do not continue class in an unsafe environment.

references.title: Refund / cost / insurance / lease / safety / legal approval boundary

items.label: Do now
items.value: Collect evidence and prepare escalation packet.

items.label: Approval boundary
items.value: Supervisor / official approval path decides outcome.

do_not: Do not promise or decide refund, reschedule, compensation, lease, cost, insurance, legal, or safety outcomes.

references.title: Camera / browser permission issue

items.label: Documented boundary
items.value: No documented device-session permission repair is recorded beyond a basic supported in-app permission prompt.

items.label: Do now
items.value: Check a basic in-app permission prompt only when supported, capture exact error text/screenshot.

items.label: Escalate
items.value: Engineer/vendor / tech support; supervisor if class affected.

do_not: Do not reinstall, re-flash, change devices, or invent browser-permission/Wi-Fi/calibration fixes.

references.title: Timer / logout / reset behavior

items.label: Documented boundary
items.value: Source does not document timer/logout/reset as intended behavior.

items.label: Do now
items.value: Treat unexpected logout/reset/timer behavior like Section 8: document and escalate.

items.label: Escalate
items.value: ALLCPR support must confirm whether expected before anyone tells students it is normal.

do_not: Do not invent a fix or call it normal without staff confirmation.

references.title: Missing supplies / dirty station / damaged equipment

items.label: Do now
items.value: Take photo evidence, note exact missing/damaged/dirty item, do safe-only cleanup if allowed.

items.label: Report
items.value: Include in Weekly Site Check Report and ALLCPR if it cannot be fixed on site.

items.label: Table items
items.value: Check iPad, manikins, AED Training Pads, consumables, tissues/simulated gauze, wipes, gloves, mask adaptors, optional face shield, Pocket Mask, BVM, and power cables.

do_not: Do not repair or dismantle damaged equipment.
